name: interview-me

positive_triggers.input: Help me build something for my project
I want to refactor the auth module, can you interview me about the requirements?

positive_triggers.reason: Decision with major consequences, needs requirement extraction first

negative_triggers.input: Add a console.log to debug the loop

behavioral_evals.scenario: User asks: 'Help me build something for my project'
expected_behavior: Agent forms a hypothesis about what's being asked
Agent asks EXACTLY ONE question via AskUserQuestion
Agent updates hypothesis based on answer
Agent loops until ~95% confident (3-7 questions typical)
Agent summarizes understanding and asks for confirmation
Agent writes Q&A summary to progress.md

behavioral_evals.scenario: User asks: 'Which database should I pick?'
expected_behavior: Agent recognizes this needs interview before answer
Agent asks one question about access pattern (read-heavy / write-heavy / mixed)
Based on answer, asks one question about scale (single instance / distributed)
Agent does NOT batch 3 questions in one round
Agent does NOT ask 'what features do you need?' (open-ended)

notes: Behavioral evals are warning-level until promoted via upstream issue tracker.
